channel.title: Vienna Public Transport — Disruptions & Commuter Info
channel.description: Active disruptions, construction works and restrictions from official sources (Wiener Linien, ÖBB, VOR/VAO, City of Vienna).

item.title: 17A/70A: gas pipe fractures
item.description: Line 17A is redirected locally in both directions. Line 70A is redirected locally in both directions. [On 05.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Line 17A is redirected locally in both directions. Line 70A is redirected locally in both directions.
[On 05.07.2026]

item.title: N54: construction works
item.description: Because of roadworks and the associated partial barrier of Mariahilfer Straße the call bus line N54 is redirected.. Period: From Thursday, 16. July … [16.07.2026 – 15.08.2027]
item.content:encoded:
Because of roadworks and the associated partial barrier of Mariahilfer Straße the call bus line N54 is redirected.. Period: From Thursday, 16. July …
[16.07.2026 – 15.08.2027]

item.title: 12A: construction works
item.description: Due to roadworks and the associated partial barrier of Mariahilfer Straße, the line 12A is redirected.. Period: From Wednesday, 15. July Start of operation … [15.07.2026 – 15.08.2027]
item.content:encoded:
Due to roadworks and the associated partial barrier of Mariahilfer Straße, the line 12A is redirected.. Period: From Wednesday, 15. July Start of operation …
[15.07.2026 – 15.08.2027]

item.title: U4: construction works
item.description: No operation between Schwedenplatz and Landstraße-Wien Mitte. [03.07.2026 – 03.08.2026]
item.content:encoded:
No operation between Schwedenplatz and Landstraße-Wien Mitte.
[03.07.2026 – 03.08.2026]

item.title: Universitätsring and Schottenring from Rathausplatz to Heßgasse
item.description: In the working area the tram operation is stopped. [06.07.2026 – 06.09.2026]
item.content:encoded:
In the working area the tram operation is stopped.
[06.07.2026 – 06.09.2026]

item.title: Gumpendorfer Straße from Wallgasse to Laimgrubengasse
item.description: The bus line 57A is short-run up to the Kaunitzgasse. [06.07.2026 – 06.09.2026]
item.content:encoded:
The bus line 57A is short-run up to the Kaunitzgasse.
[06.07.2026 – 06.09.2026]

item.title: Alaudagasse from crossing Favoritenstraße and Pichelmayergasse from crossing Ada-Christen-Gasse
item.description: The line 19A is redirected via Favoritenstraße Franz-Koci-Straße Jura-Soyfer-Straße Alaudagasse Walter-Lindenbaum-Gasse Wendstattgasse. [06.07.2026 – 24.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:
The line 19A is redirected via Favoritenstraße Franz-Koci-Straße Jura-Soyfer-Straße Alaudagasse Walter-Lindenbaum-Gasse Wendstattgasse.
[06.07.2026 – 24.07.2026]

item.title: Nußdorfer Straße Crossing Währinger Street and Spitalgasse
item.description: During the period from 13.07.2026 to 21.08.2026, all tram lines in the section concerned will cease to operate. [06.07.2026 – 04.09.2026]
item.content:encoded:
During the period from 13.07.2026 to 21.08.2026, all tram lines in the section concerned will cease to operate.
[06.07.2026 – 04.09.2026]

item.title: Währinger Straße 46 to 54
item.description: Work is carried out day and night in the roadway area of Währinger Straße between Strudlhofgasse and Nußdorfer Straße, as part of the … [06.07.2026 – 04.09.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Work is carried out day and night in the roadway area of Währinger Straße between Strudlhofgasse and Nußdorfer Straße, as part of the …
[06.07.2026 – 04.09.2026]

item.title: Johnstraße from Goldschlagstraße to Hütteldorfer Straße and Schanzstraße
item.description: For more information on the diversion and the transfer of the public transport system concerned, please refer to the information provided by Wiener Linien GmbH & Co KG. [06.07.2026 – 06.09.2026]
item.content:encoded:
For more information on the diversion and the transfer of the public transport system concerned, please refer to the information provided by Wiener Linien GmbH & Co KG.
[06.07.2026 – 06.09.2026]
